project.component: { "keyToString": { "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "Database connection parameters found", "Notification.DoNotAsk-DatabaseConfigFileWatcher.found": "true", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder0": "0", "RequestMappingsPanelOrder1": "1", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth0": "75", "RequestMappingsPanelWidth1": "75", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "I do mind", "Shell Script.run-local.sh.executor": "Run", "Spring Boot.Unnamed.executor": "Run", "Spring Boot.WeatherTuneApplication.executor": "Run", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultAutoModeForALLUsers.v1": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/Users/dhirajnath/Downloads/weather-music-recommender", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary:
feat: enable anonymous dashboard and weather-based recommendations
- remove Spotify user-login requirement from dashboard and recommendations API - allow anonymous access to / and /dashboard in security configuration - switch Spotify integration to client-credentials token flow - add fallback track search when recommendations endpoint is unavailable - simplify UI by removing login/logout controls from dashboard - update README to document no-login local usage

feat: enable anonymous dashboard and weather-based recommendations
- remove Spotify user-login requirement from dashboard and recommendations API - allow anonymous access to / and /dashboard in security configuration - switch Spotify integration to client-credentials token flow - add fallback track search when recommendations endpoint is unavailable - simplify UI by removing login/logout controls from dashboard - update README to document no-login local usage

MESSAGE.value:
feat: enable anonymous dashboard and weather-based recommendations
- remove Spotify user-login requirement from dashboard and recommendations API - allow anonymous access to / and /dashboard in security configuration - switch Spotify integration to client-credentials token flow - add fallback track search when recommendations endpoint is unavailable - simplify UI by removing login/logout controls from dashboard - update README to document no-login local usage

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: enable anonymous dashboard and weather-based recommendations
- remove Spotify user-login requirement from dashboard and recommendations API - allow anonymous access to / and /dashboard in security configuration - switch Spotify integration to client-credentials token flow - add fallback track search when recommendations endpoint is unavailable - simplify UI by removing login/logout controls from dashboard - update README to document no-login local usage
